description: Create an HR Attrition Analysis Dashboard in WPS Spreadsheet using the data in /home/ga/Documents/hr_attrition_data.xlsx. In a new sheet named 'Attrition_Summary', generate two analysis tables and a clustered column chart. Table 1 (Role Analysis) starting at A1 must include headers for Job Role, Total Count, Attrited, Retained, Attrition Rate, Avg Income (Attrited), Avg Income (Retained), and Risk Flag. Analyze the following roles: Healthcare Representative, Human Resources, Laboratory Technician, Manager, Manufacturing Director, Research Director, Research Scientist, Sales Executive, and Sales Representative. Calculate the Attrition Rate and Average Incomes based on the 'EmployeeData' sheet; the Risk Flag must display 'High Risk' for rates strictly greater than 15% and 'Normal' otherwise. Apply light red conditional formatting to Attrition Rate cells in Table 1 that exceed 15%. Table 2 (Satisfaction Analysis) starting at A13 must include headers for Job Satisfaction, Total Count, Attrited, and Attrition Rate for satisfaction levels 1, 2, 3, and 4. Include a Clustered Column Chart on the sheet visualizing Job Role versus Attrition Rate from Table 1. Save the updated workbook to /home/ga/Documents/hr_attrition_data.xlsx.

metadata.data_source: IBM HR Analytics Employee Attrition Dataset
